remarks: $36,000 PRICE REDUCTION! This Significant price improvement makes this one of the VERY BEST values available in all of Stamford! The Stonebrook community is located in the ever popular Mid-Ridges neighborhood, truly one of Stamford's most sought-after communities and boasts LOCATION, LOCATION, LOCATION! Additionally, you'll love the low maintenance lifestyle and very reasonable HOA (just $430 per month). This home has been totally refreshed and is move in ready! The open and airy main level features a eat in kitchen (with all new, never used appliances). Just off the kitchen and leading outside to the expansive rear deck is a family room with gas fireplace. Also on the main level is a half bath along with the living room and an additional space which can be used as a dining room, home office or bedroom. The garage is just off the kitchen for convenient grocery unloading. The second floor offers a comfortable primary suite with oversized bath and a generous walk in closet. There are two additional bedrooms and another full bath. In the foyer, there is space which might be utilized for a home elevator if desired. Additional positives include gas heat, HUGE attic storage, plenty of guest parking and beautifully maintained grounds. This home is conveniently located just minutes from the Merritt Parkway, Sterling Farms golf course, tons of shopping, restaurants, schools and so much more!
